response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is primarily in full-stack web and embedded software development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software engineering experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack software development skills across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience in performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated technical communication and teaching ability
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware optimization experience
